title: cynosurus cristatus var. polybracteatus
intro: Cynosurus cristatus var. polybracteatus, also known as the tall dwarf brome or a variety of the dog's tail grass, is a plant species that belongs to the grass family and is native to Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The health benefits of Cynosurus cristatus var. polybracteatus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
